requirement_topic.en: IEC 61851 Safety Baseline — AGANOR Conformity and Humid Tropical Conditions
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 61851安全基线——AGANOR合格评定与湿热环境
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 61851安全基線——AGANOR合格評定與濕熱環境

summary.en: AGANOR is Gabon's national standards body and is the expected authority for national standards and conformity questions. For EVSE, the defensible technical baseline is the IEC 61851 family: IEC 61851-1 for conductive charging general requirements and IEC 61851-23 for DC charging stations. Safety evidence should cover control pilot behaviour, protective earthing, residual-current protection, isolation monitoring, interlocks, overcurrent and over-temperature protection, emergency stop where applicable, enclosure ingress protection, corrosion resistance, and installation instructions in French. Gabon's hot and humid equatorial climate increases the importance of IP rating, condensation control, creepage/clearance review, corrosion protection, and thermal derating.
summary.zh: AGANOR是加蓬国家标准机构，是国家标准和合格评定问题的预期主管机构。对于EVSE，可辩护的技术基线是IEC 61851体系：IEC 61851-1适用于传导充电通用要求，IEC 61851-23适用于直流充电站。安全证据应覆盖控制导引、保护接地、剩余电流保护、绝缘监测、互锁、过流和过温保护、适用时的急停、外壳防护等级、防腐，以及法语安装说明。加蓬炎热、高湿赤道气候使IP等级、冷凝控制、爬电/电气间隙审查、防腐和热降额更加重要。
summary.zht: AGANOR是加彭國家標準機構，是國家標準和合格評定問題的預期主管機構。對於EVSE，可辯護的技術基線是IEC 61851體系：IEC 61851-1適用於傳導充電通用要求，IEC 61851-23適用於直流充電站。安全證據應覆蓋控制導引、保護接地、剩餘電流保護、絕緣監測、互鎖、過流和過溫保護、適用時的急停、外殼防護等級、防腐，以及法語安裝說明。加彭炎熱、高濕赤道氣候使IP等級、冷凝控制、爬電/電氣間隙審查、防腐和熱降額更加重要。

standards_or_laws: AGANOR — Agence Gabonaise de Normalisation, national standards and conformity body
IEC 61851-1:2017 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 61851-23:2023 — DC electric vehicle supply equipment
IEC 60529 — Degrees of protection provided by enclosures (IP Code)
IEC 60664 series — insulation coordination for low-voltage equipment

summary.en: China's comparable baseline is GB/T 18487.1-2023, supported by GB/T connector and communication standards. GB/T 18487.1-2023 is useful for engineering review, but it includes China-specific connector and signalling assumptions and does not by itself prove IEC 61851 conformity, AGANOR acceptance, or suitability for Gabon's humid tropical field conditions.
summary.zh: 中国可比基线为GB/T 18487.1-2023，并配套GB/T接口和通信标准。GB/T 18487.1-2023可用于工程审查，但其包含中国特有接口和信号假设，本身不能证明符合IEC 61851、获得AGANOR认可，或适合加蓬湿热现场环境。
summary.zht: 中國可比基線為GB/T 18487.1-2023，並配套GB/T接口和通訊標準。GB/T 18487.1-2023可用於工程審查，但其包含中國特有接口和信號假設，本身不能證明符合IEC 61851、獲得AGANOR認可，或適合加彭濕熱現場環境。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18487.1-2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements

gap.en: Exporters should prepare an IEC 61851-1 clause matrix, IEC 61851-23 evidence for DC stations, accredited safety reports, IP and corrosion evidence, humidity and condensation review, surge-protection data, protective-device ratings, French safety labels and manuals, and site installation instructions. A standalone GB/T safety report is not enough without an IEC clause-level gap assessment and Gabon-specific environmental review.
gap.zh: 出口商应准备IEC 61851-1逐条矩阵、直流站IEC 61851-23证据、认可安全测试报告、IP和防腐证据、高湿和冷凝审查、防雷浪涌数据、保护器件额定值、法语安全标签和说明书，以及现场安装说明。单独的GB/T安全报告在未完成IEC逐条差距评估和加蓬环境专项审查时并不足够。
gap.zht: 出口商應準備IEC 61851-1逐條矩陣、直流站IEC 61851-23證據、認可安全測試報告、IP和防腐證據、高濕和冷凝審查、防雷浪湧數據、保護器件額定值、法語安全標籤和說明書，以及現場安裝說明。單獨的GB/T安全報告在未完成IEC逐條差距評估和加彭環境專項審查時並不足夠。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional but practically required — AGANOR conformity route and project specifications should be verified for the exact product; IEC 61851 evidence is the expected technical baseline for EVSE safety
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 18487 applies to China domestic design and is not accepted as direct IEC 61851 evidence without additional assessment

source.publisher: International Organization for Standardization — Gabon member listing

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat GB/T 18487.1-2023 as a design reference only. A Gabon-facing package should use IEC 61851 safety evidence, French documentation, and tropical humidity/corrosion derating before AGANOR or project review.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应仅将GB/T 18487.1-2023作为设计参考。面向加蓬的资料包应采用IEC 61851安全证据、法语文件，以及热带高湿/防腐降额资料，再提交AGANOR或项目审查。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應僅將GB/T 18487.1-2023作為設計參考。面向加彭的資料包應採用IEC 61851安全證據、法語文件，以及熱帶高濕/防腐降額資料，再提交AGANOR或項目審查。
